attempts.strategy: Counit of free ⊣ global-sections: identity family of sections under freeHomEquiv, indexed by F.sections (NOT derived/Ab Γ)
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def evalMap {X : Scheme.{u}} (F : X.Modules) : trivialBundle (X := X) F.sections ⟶ F := (SheafOfModules.freeHomEquiv F (I := F.sections)).symm id
attempts.insight: LSP-confirmed type (free F.sections ⟶ F) ≃ (F.sections → F.sections); .symm id is the counit component. Domain typed trivialBundle F.sections (defeq free F.sections) to honour \uses{found:trivial_bundle}. F.sections : Type u confirmed (avoids universe mismatch with derived Γ).

attempts.strategy: Categorical kernel of evalMap in abelian X.Modules
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def evalKernel {X : Scheme.{u}} (F : X.Modules) : X.Modules := Limits.kernel (evalMap F)
attempts.insight: HasKernel (evalMap F) discharged automatically via IsGrothendieckAbelian X.Modules → Abelian → HasKernel (heavy bridge in-file). #print axioms clean. This is M_F; kernelBundle := evalKernel L next iter in Basic.lean.

next_steps: Scaffold MR4213770.kernelBundle := evalKernel L in Basic.lean — first genuine paper object.

Mathlib pullbackObjFreeIso is for the PULLBACK functor, NOT this pushforward — does not apply. DEAD END at Type u without first establishing the PreservesColimitsOfShape instance.
